title_en: AI Mode in Google Search now helps you book restaurants in the UK
title_zh: Google Search 中的 AI Mode 現已支援在英國預訂餐廳
fulltext: Google uses "find a table for two at a dog-friendly Italian restaurant in Shoreditch for Saturday at 7PM" as an example in the post announcing the new feature. There's also "find me a sushi restaurant nearby that has a table for four that also serves vegan tempura". You get the idea.
